schema.ion.id › trade › performance › v1

trade/performance/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/performance/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradePerformanceAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/performance/v1#TradePerformanceAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
performanceModealwaysHow the fulfilment is executed. DELIVERY: logistics delivers to buyer address. SELF_PICKUP: buyer collects from seller l
supportedPerformanceModesalwaysAll performance modes supported by this provider for this offer. Declared in on_select. Buyer selects mode at init.
slaalwaysService Level Agreement for fulfilment timing.
handlingoptionalSpecial handling requirements for this fulfilment. Determines logistics eligibility and surcharges.
readyToShipconditionalSeller signals that the package is physically ready for logistics pickup. Sent by BPP via /update. Triggers LSP to dispa
awbNumberconditionalAir Waybill number assigned by the logistics provider after pickup. Enables tracking on LSP platform.
trackingUrlconditionalURL for real-time shipment tracking. Provided by logistics provider after pickup. BAP renders as tracking link or embedd
estimatedDeliveryTimeconditionalUpdated estimated delivery datetime in ISO 8601 with timezone. BPP updates dynamically as fulfilment progresses.
agentNameconditionalName of delivery agent or driver assigned to this fulfilment.
agentPhoneconditionalIndonesian mobile number, 10-13 digits.
agentPhotoconditionalURL to photo of delivery agent. Displayed by BAP for consumer security verification. URL must remain valid for 24 hours.
deliveryOtpconditionalOne-time password required for agent to confirm delivery. Consumer shows OTP to agent at doorstep.
deliveryProofUrlconditionalURL to photo proof of delivery — package at door or consumer signature. Added at DELIVERED state.
selfPickupCodeconditionalUnique code generated by BPP for self-pickup orders. Consumer presents this code at counter to collect order.
returnAgentNameconditionalName of pickup agent for return collection.
returnTrackingUrlconditionalTracking URL for return shipment.
installationSchedulingconditionalInstallation appointment scheduling. Declared capability is in resource.installation. This carries the transaction-time
realTimeGpsconditionalCurrent GPS position of delivery agent. Updated via /track API. Not persisted — real-time only.
lspSubscriberIdconditionalSubscriber ID of the on-network logistics provider handling this fulfilment. Enables ION to trace the cascaded logistics
shippingInsuranceconditionalInsurance declaration for high-value shipments. Mandatory for items above IDR 5,000,000 on all major marketplaces. Affec
agentIdconditionalPlatform-issued agent ID that consumer can verify against BPP app or logistics app. More trustworthy than name alone — p
agentVehicleTypeoptionalAgent vehicle type — affects delivery ETA and corporate policy
agentPlateNumberoptionalIndonesian vehicle plate (Nomor Polisi). Required by some corporate buyers for building access.
agentBadgeNumberoptionalPhysical badge number the agent carries. Consumers verify at door. Distinct from agentId which is internal.
liveAgentLocationUrloptionalURL for live agent location tracking (distinct from trackingUrl which is package-centric). Agent-centric view consumers
qcResultconditionalQuality inspection result when return package is received by seller. Determines refund amount — full for QC_PASSED, part
qcNotesconditionalSeller-provided explanation of QC findings
qcEvidenceconditionalPhoto/video URLs from seller's QC inspection. Used in dispute resolution.
marketplaceManagedLogisticsoptionalTrue when logistics is orchestrated by the BAP (marketplace) rather than the BPP (seller). Seller BPP handles ready-to-s
slaBreachCountoptionalNumber of SLA TATs breached by BPP on this fulfilment. Incremented by BAP each time an expected on_status does not arriv
slaBreachDetailsoptionalRecord of each SLA breach for audit trail.
ageVerificationRequiredconditionalWhether delivery agent must verify buyer age at door before handover. Derived from resource.ageRestricted; BPP copies to
ageVerificationMethodconditionalMethod used to verify buyer age at delivery. KTP_SIGHTED: agent visually confirms KTP DOB. KTP_SCANNED: agent scans KTP
ageVerifiedAtconditionalTimestamp of successful verification at door
ageVerifiedByAgentIdconditionalAgent ID of the person who performed verification
ageVerificationEvidenceconditionalURL to evidence of verification (photo of KTP with DOB visible, scan result). Retained per platform policy. Must be encr
ageVerificationFailedReasonconditionalReason age verification failed at delivery. Performance state should transition to DELIVERY_FAILED with this reason tag,

Pack README

trade/performance/v1

Fulfilment tracking attributes — agent details, AWB, SLA, handling, installation.

Attaches to

`beckn:Performance.performanceAttributes`

Performance modes

ModeDescription
DELIVERYLogistics delivers to buyer address
SELF_PICKUPBuyer collects from seller location
DINE_INFor restaurant orders consumed on premises
CURBSIDEBuyer drives to pickup, seller brings to car

State machine reference

States are defined in `schema/extensions/trade/performance-states/v1/states.yaml`.

Do not redefine state codes in flow files — always reference the canonical states.

SLA

SLA `unitBasis` options:

  • `ORDER_CONFIRMATION` — countdown from when buyer confirms
  • `SHIPMENT` — countdown from when package is dispatched
  • `PAYMENT_RECEIPT` — countdown from payment confirmation

    • Installation scheduling

    `resource.installation` declares capability (does it need installation? does seller provide it?).

    `performance.installationScheduling` carries the transaction-time appointment (scheduledDate, notes).

    Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/performance/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
